title: [CI:DOCS] fix cmd `set DOCKER_HOST` suggestion
body:
#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
```release-note
None
```
---

I presume the commands provided are intended to be copy-pasted. In that case, the command to set `DOCKER_HOST` env variable in cmd context is incorrect.

comments.body:
```
C:\Users\zhangguanzhang>set a = 1

C:\Users\zhangguanzhang>set b=2

C:\Users\zhangguanzhang>echo %a%
%a%

C:\Users\zhangguanzhang>echo %b%
2

```

lgtm
